first_run.rationale: The score is identical (4/10) in both evaluations. The reasoning across the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively the same, focusing consistently on the candidate's lack of recent C++ experience and specific industrial automation skills. The minor differences in phrasing and the specific examples of missing protocols cited are well within the range of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the core assessment of the candidate's fitness for the role.
